testcase.name: User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123"

testcase.system-out: âœ” Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userIsOnLoginPage()

testcase.name: User clicks the login button
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: âœ” When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123" # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userEntersValidCredentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: User should be redirected to the dashboard
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: âœ” And User clicks the login button # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userClicksLoginButton()

testcase.name: Dashboard title should be displayed
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Dashboard title is empty at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.DashboardSteps.verifyDashboardTitle(DashboardSteps.java:48) at ✽.Dashboard title should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:14)

testcase.name: Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.classname: OrangeHRM Login Tests
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Dashboard title is empty at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.DashboardSteps.verifyDashboardTitle(DashboardSteps.java:48) at ✽.Dashboard title should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:14)
testcase.system-out: âœ˜ And Dashboard title should be displayed # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.DashboardSteps.verifyDashboardTitle() java.lang.AssertionError: Dashboard title is empty at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.DashboardSteps.verifyDashboardTitle(DashboardSteps.java:48) at âœ½.Dashboard title should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:14) ======== Ending Test Scenario ======== Browser closed successfully

testcase.name: User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123"
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with different valid credentials
testcase.system-out: âœ” Given User is on the OrangeHRM login page # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userIsOnLoginPage()

testcase.name: User clicks the login button
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with different valid credentials
testcase.system-out: âœ” When User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123" # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userEntersValidCredentials(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: User should be redirected to the dashboard
testcase.classname: Verify user can login with different valid credentials
testcase.system-out: âœ” And User clicks the login button # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.userClicksLoginButton()

testcase.name: User is on the OrangeHRM login page
testcase.classname: Verify login fails with invalid username
testcase.system-out:
âœ” Then User should be redirected to the dashboard # com.orangehrm.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyUserIsOnDashboard() ======== Ending Test Scenario ======== Browser closed successfully
